title: Decadent Chewy Korean Bun
description: A low-calorie-friendly, solo-dinner Korean dish featuring a unique blend of floral flavors, chewy texture, and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, salt, and yeast.
Add grated ginger, water, milk, and butter to the dry ingredients.
Mix the dough until it forms a sticky ball, then knead for 10 minutes.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium-high heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired bun size.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Cook the buns for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown.
Brush the cooked buns with condensed milk, then sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Serve the buns warm, garnished with additional sesame seeds and a drizzle of honey if desired.
